title: pronephrium sampsonii
intro: Pronephrium sampsonii, also known as the Sampson's Pronephrium, is a species of fern native to the Philippines. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Pronephrium sampsonii include relief from fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Pronephrium sampsonii is typically prepared in herbal teas or infusions, as well as in dried or powdered form, to be used in traditional medicine.
